name: What is the fastest thing I can do today to improve Siri visibility?
description: Publish one clear, factual FAQ page that answers the exact questions customers ask most often.

mainEntity.name: What is the fastest thing I can do today to improve Siri visibility?

acceptedAnswer.text: You can start with a few high-value questions that customers already ask on calls or in messages. Turn each into a concise answer page and keep the language direct, factual, and local where relevant. This is especially useful for service businesses in San Diego, Austin, or Denver that need quick voice-friendly answers.
acceptedAnswer.description: Publish one clear, factual FAQ page that answers the exact questions customers ask most often.
